title: Key Milestones in PQC Standardization
description: Chronological walkthrough of the critical milestones in the NIST PQC standardization journey from 2016 to 2024 and beyond.
learningObjectives: Recall key dates in the NIST PQC timeline
Understand the significance of each major milestone
Track the evolution of algorithm counts through rounds
Identify critical events that shaped the final standards
Anticipate upcoming milestones in PQC adoption
